business.name: Tica Cleaning Service LLC
business.tagline: The clean you notice, the service you remember

hero.headline: *Every surface* looking like new again
hero.subheadline: From driveways to restaurant kitchens — we show up on short notice and deliver results that exceed expectations.

services_section.label: THE CLEAN
services_section.heading: Every job gets the same attention
services_section.subheading: Residential homes, commercial kitchens, rental turnovers — one call handles it all

services.title: House Pressure Washing
services.description: Exterior walls, driveways, walkways, and decks. We spot what you miss and clean what you can't reach.

services.title: Commercial Cleaning
services.description: Restaurant kitchens, retail spaces, office buildings. Professional results that keep your business running smooth.

services.title: Rental Property Turnover
services.description: Fast turnaround between tenants. Deep clean that gets properties rent-ready on your timeline.

services.title: Emergency Response
services.description: Short notice calls welcome. Same-day quotes, next-day service when you need it most.

about.heading: Real people answering the phone
about.body: We're a Gastonia cleaning team that shows up when we say we will. One call gets you a quote within hours and work done right the first time.

reviews.name: Neesie H.
reviews.text: Outstanding experience! Called on short notice and they responded promptly. They spotted areas that needed cleaning I hadn't even noticed and went above and beyond.

reviews.name: Ben C.
reviews.text: Professional, timely, exceptional work. We use them for our restaurant and they do an incredible job. Top-tier service at very reasonable prices.

reviews.name: Ashley G.
reviews.text: Could not be happier with their work on the house. Very thorough, did a great job, and extremely kind. Will definitely call them again.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Gastonia and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times throughout the greater Charlotte region

cta.heading: Ready for that fresh, clean look?
cta.body: Call now for a free quote. Same professional team, same thorough results, every single time.
